_comment: Phase 5 (#492) quickstart workload — exercises the full lab pipeline end-to-end against the built-in `demo-tiny-py` fixture. Operator does: `scripts/lab-init.sh` (registers built-in fixtures) → `darkmux lab run demo-quickstart` → verify the COW-clone + per-run sandbox + verify-command + manifest-with-baseline_hash all land correctly. No external setup required beyond `python3` being on PATH.

workload.prompt:
TINY TEST GAP

The `parse_line()` function in ${SANDBOX_DIR}/src/parser.py handles
structured log lines of the form `<timestamp>  <LEVEL>  <message>`.
It requires 2+ spaces between fields and returns None for malformed
input.

The existing tests under ${SANDBOX_DIR}/tests/test_parser.py cover
the basic shapes (well-formed, blank, message-with-spaces, totally
unparseable, single-space-fails). One canonical case is missing:

  - A line that has the right shape but has an EMPTY message after
    the second separator (e.g. `"2026-05-29  INFO  "` — two spaces,
    then trailing whitespace). The parser returns None for this; add
    one new test pinning that behavior.

Add exactly one new test method to the existing TestParseLine class.
Keep it under 5 lines of test code. Run the test suite after editing
to confirm it passes.

## Constraints

- Repo root: ${SANDBOX_DIR}. Use absolute paths.
- Modify ONLY tests/test_parser.py — add one method.
- Verify with: cd ${SANDBOX_DIR} && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests

## Reply format

- The test method you added (single code block)
- Final unittest summary line ("OK" / counts)
